questions.question: Identify the quantifier used in the statement: 'All students who study mathematics are intelligent.' Which quantifier is it and explain its usage in the context of the sentence.
questions.hint: Understand the difference between universal and existential quantifiers

questions.question: Simplify the following statement using quantifiers: '(x ∈ A and x ∈ B) or (x ∈ A and x ∉ B)' where A and B are sets. What quantifier is used in this simplification?
questions.hint: Practice applying quantifier rules to simplify statements

questions.question: A bookshelf has exactly 5 shelves. Which quantifier should be used to describe the number of books on each shelf? Justify your answer with an explanation.
questions.hint: Understand the difference between 'exactly' and 'at least' or 'at most' quantifiers
